steps.title: Keep the verbs parallel
steps.content: The sentence says the merchants "exported" certain goods and then needs a parallel verb for what they did with other commodities. The blank must match the simple past-tense form.

steps.title: Reject nonparallel forms
steps.content: Choice A is an infinitive, Choice C is a present participle, and Choice D is a perfect participle. None parallels the past-tense verb "exported." The correct form is another simple past-tense verb describing what the merchants did. The answer is B.
